reasoning: The question asks if the WHO will declare a new COVID pandemic (other than SARS-CoV-2) in 2025. The prompt's reference is to a bat coronavirus (HKU5-CoV-2) discovered in a lab in February 2025 to have the capability of entering human cells similarly to COVID-19. Searches through June 2025 confirm that this virus has never been detected in a human, let alone caused an outbreak. Furthermore, as of November 2025, there are no news reports of any new coronavirus causing global outbreaks, much less nearing a pandemic declaration by the WHO. The base rate of a new pandemic emerging and spreading widely enough to prompt a WHO declaration within the final month of the year is infinitesimally small. Therefore, I assign the minimum possible probability.
